finding.title: 刷新中断后 analysisStatus 永久卡在 mapping/reducing，UI 死锁
finding.file: components/NovelDetail.tsx
finding.detail: busy 把持久化的 status==='mapping'/'reducing' 当作运行中，但刷新后没有 runner 也没有 AbortController；pause 调 abortRef.current?.abort() 在 abortRef 为 null 时无操作，且无任何 useEffect 在挂载时恢复或将僵死 status 回落为 idle。
finding.repro: 1) 配好 LLM，导入一本多章小说；2) 点「深度全量测序」开始提取；3) 提取进行中刷新页面（F5）；4) 看到旋转螺旋+「正在测序 X/Y」进度条静止；5) 点「暂停测序」无反应；6) 无「快速/全量提取」按钮可用——状态永久卡死。

verdict.evidence:
components/NovelDetail.tsx:186 `const busy = extracting || status === 'mapping' || status === 'reducing';` — `extracting` is useState(false) (L85), reset to false on every fresh mount; `status = novel.analysisStatus` (L185) comes from useLiveQuery (L81) reading PERSISTED IndexedDB. The runner persists status to disk immediately: app/dnaEngine.ts:209 `analysisStatus: 'mapping'` and :348 `analysisStatus: 'reducing'`. So after F5 mid-run, busy===true with no live runner / no AbortController.

components/NovelDetail.tsx:209 `const pause = () => abortRef.current?.abort();` — abortRef = useRef<AbortController|null>(null) (L91), assigned a controller ONLY inside handleExtract (L197-198) and nulled in its finally (L205). After refresh handleExtract never ran ⇒ abortRef.current === null ⇒ optional-chaining makes pause() a silent no-op. The 暂停测序 button (L619-624 onClick={pause}) is dead.

components/NovelDetail.tsx:508 `{busy ? (` renders the spinning helix SVG (L515-577), the frozen `🧬 正在测序 X/Y` header (L583) and static progress bar (L604-608). The only restart buttons 快速提取/深度全量测序 (L705-716) live in the `else` branch (L698), so they are unreachable while busy ⇒ no usable extraction button (description step 6 accurate).

NO mount-time recovery exists: NovelDetail's only useEffects (L103 feed-reset, L111 timer-cleanup, L117 feed-build, L150 auto-scroll) never touch analysisStatus. Codebase-wide, analysisStatus←'idle' happens only at dnaEngine.ts:338/380 (inside a running runner, gated on signal.aborted), db.ts:231 v5 upgrade (`novel.analysisStatus || 'idle'` — a stale 'mapping' is truthy so it is PRESERVED, not reset), and NovelUploader.tsx:721 (new upload) / :863 (re-split runResplit) — both user-triggered on the uploader, not on detail mount. No beforeunload, no resume, no stale-status reaper. Status is permanently stuck.
verdict.correctedDescription: 确认成立。analysisStatus 持久化在 IndexedDB（dnaEngine 在进入 Map 前写 'mapping'@L209、进入 Reduce 前写 'reducing'@L348），刷新后通过 useLiveQuery 读回。busy（NovelDetail.tsx:186）= extracting(刷新后恒 false) || status==='mapping' || status==='reducing'，故刷新中断后 busy 恒为 true，渲染 busy 分支（L508）的静止螺旋+「正在测序 X/Y」进度条；而「快速/全量提取」按钮在 else 分支（L698-716）不可达。pause（L209）= abortRef.current?.abort()，刷新后 abortRef 为 null（仅 handleExtract@L197-198 才赋值），可选链使「暂停测序」按钮（L620）彻底空操作。全代码库无任何挂载期 useEffect 把僵死 status 回落为 idle：NovelDetail 的 4 个 useEffect 均不碰 analysisStatus；置 idle 仅出现在运行中 runner（dnaEngine:338/380，且受 signal.aborted 守卫）、db v5 升级（db.ts:231，但 `|| 'idle'` 对真值 'mapping' 不生效 → 反而保留僵死值）、以及 NovelUploader 的新上传(L721)/重切(L863) 用户动作。唯一逃生路径是离开详情页去「重切」(NovelUploader runResplit 会重置为 idle)或删除该作品；详情页内承诺的「暂停测序」恢复手段确为死按钮。复现步骤完全成立。仅须微调位置标注：L508 是 busy 渲染分支（螺旋/进度/暂停面板），「无提取按钮」症状源于按钮位于 else 分支 L698-716。

finding.title: 微调命中非目标块时静默清空命令、无反馈（且丢弃后端合法的多块修改）
finding.file: components/FusionWorkshop.tsx
finding.detail: effectiveKeys = targetOnly.length>0 ? targetOnly : []（:313）：当后端 modifiedBlocks 不含 tweakTarget（模型判定无需改该块，或改了相邻块）时不应用任何变更，但 :321 仍 setCommand('') 清空输入，且不 setError/不提示。后端本可返回多块修改（schemas.py:92-97 modifiedBlocks 可多值），被前端单点过滤丢弃。
finding.repro: 进入创作台，微调目标选「世界观」，输入一句明显只影响主角的指令（如『把主角改成女性』）→ 点发送 → 命令框被清空、四个积木无变化、无任何错误或「未修改」提示。

verdict.evidence: FusionWorkshop.tsx:313 `const effectiveKeys = targetOnly.length > 0 ? targetOnly : [];` — targetOnly = reported.filter(key => key === tweakTarget) (:312). If backend modifiedBlocks omits the pinned tweakTarget, effectiveKeys=[] → forEach (:314-318) updates nothing. FusionWorkshop.tsx:321 `setCommand('');` runs unconditionally right after setBlocks, with NO setError/notice on the no-op path. Grep for 未修改/无变化/toast/notify across the component = "No matches found" → confirmed silent clear, zero feedback. BUT the secondary claim is refuted by the real call path: FusionWorkshop.tsx:304 ALWAYS sends `targetBlock: tweakTarget` (unconditional; no code path omits it), and api/index.py:533-538 then injects a hard guard — "modifiedBlocks 只能包含 {data.targetBlock}…其他卡片必须返回 null 且不得改写" (index.py:536-537). So schemas.py:92-97's multi-value modifiedBlocks is only reachable when targetBlock is null, which the frontend never does; the backend is explicitly told to return a single block, so the frontend is NOT discarding "legitimate multi-block backend edits".
verdict.correctedDescription: Confirmed bug (silent UX): in runTweak, when the LLM's modifiedBlocks does not include the user-selected tweakTarget, effectiveKeys becomes [] (FusionWorkshop.tsx:313) so no block changes, yet setCommand('') still clears the input (:321) and no setError / toast / "未修改" notice fires anywhere in the component — the user sees the command vanish with no visible effect and no explanation. The repro (target=世界观, instruction only affects 主角 → cleared box, no change, no message) is plausible whenever the model returns empty/other-block modifiedBlocks. HOWEVER the audit's parenthetical "(且丢弃后端合法的多块修改)" / "后端本可返回多块修改被前端单点过滤丢弃" is inaccurate: the frontend unconditionally pins targetBlock=tweakTarget on every call (:304), and the backend, given targetBlock, hard-constrains the model to modifiedBlocks containing ONLY that block with all others null (index.py:533-538). The multi-block path (schemas.py:92-97) is only reachable with targetBlock=null, which never occurs from this UI — so no legitimate multi-block edit is being thrown away by the :312-313 filter. The real defect is purely the missing no-op feedback + unconditional input clear, not data loss of intended multi-block backend output. Note the redundant filter: since the backend is already pinned to a single block, the :312 targetOnly filter is essentially defensive dead-narrowing rather than the discard of valid multi-block results.

finding.title: generate-fusion-directions / tweak / storyboard / stream-storyboard / stream-scene-text：adversarialRules (红队对抗) [unused]
finding.file: 后端 schemas.py:81,107,140,153 + index.py:487-488,541-542,581-582,618-619,690-691 全支持；前端全树 grep adversarialRules/红队 = 0 命中；CLAUDE.md:125 谎称有『反套路红队约束』输入，实际 FusionWorkshop.tsx:732-741 只有 customPrompt。
finding.detail: 这是本切片最大的能力空洞：在引力室与创作台加一个『红队对抗规则』输入框，串入 generate-fusion-directions/tweak-fusion-blocks/stream-storyboard/stream-scene-text 的请求体（payload.adversarialRules）。

verdict.evidence:
BACKEND FULL SUPPORT (verified): schemas.py declares adversarialRules: Optional[str] = Field(None, max_length=2000) on 4 input models — FusionDirectionsInput:81, TweakBlocksInput:107, StoryboardInput:140, SceneTextInput:153. index.py injects it into the LLM system prompt at all 5 endpoints: generate_fusion_directions @487-488 (`【用户红队对抗规则（最高优先级，违反即重写）】`), tweak_fusion_blocks @541-542, run_generate_storyboard @581-582 (shared by generate-storyboard:603 + stream-storyboard:608), stream_storyboard event_generator @618-619, stream_scene_text @690-691 (all `【用户红队对抗规则（必须遵守）】`). FRONTEND ZERO USAGE (verified): global Grep for `adversarialRules` across yaml-write = matches only api/index.py, api/schemas.py, CLAUDE.md; ZERO in any .tsx/.ts (`Grep glob *.tsx`→No matches; `glob *.ts`→No matches). Grep for `红队` in frontend = 0 (only index.py + CLAUDE.md). All 4 FusionWorkshop.tsx request bodies omit the field: line 251-253 generate-fusion-directions sends only `userCustomPrompt: customPrompt.trim() || undefined`; line 302-306 tweak-fusion-blocks sends `{...blocks, targetBlock, userInstruction}`; line 345-346 stream-storyboard sends `{selectedDirection, sceneCount: 3}`; line 390-397 stream-scene-text sends `{selectedDirection, currentScene, precedingTexts, currentDraft, resumeFromText}`. CLAUDE.md:125 FALSE CLAIM (verified): "引力室 (pick 1+ DNA-ready novels + optional 自定义大方向 / 反套路红队约束 → generate-fusion-directions)". The only optional input in 引力室 is FusionWorkshop.tsx:732-741: a single textarea `

偏航指令（可选）
verdict.correctedDescription: CONFIRMED capability gap. Backend fully plumbs a 红队对抗规则 (adversarialRules) input across 5 endpoints (schemas.py:81/107/140/153 on 4 models; index.py:487/541/581/618/690 inject into prompts), but the frontend never exposes or sends it: 0 grep hits for adversarialRules/红队 in any .tsx/.ts, and all four FusionWorkshop calls (generate-fusion-directions:251, tweak-fusion-blocks:302, stream-storyboard:345, stream-scene-text:390) omit the field. The single optional textarea in 引力室 (FusionWorkshop.tsx:732-741, customPrompt "偏航指令/自定义碰撞方向") feeds userCustomPrompt, NOT adversarialRules. CLAUDE.md:125 overstates the UI by listing "反套路红队约束" as an 引力室 input — that input does not exist. Minor precision corrections to the original claim: (a) it lists 5 endpoints but only 4 schema input models hold the field (StoryboardInput is shared by both generate-storyboard and stream-storyboard); (b) the claim title omits non-streaming generate-storyboard, which also receives adversarialRules via the shared run_generate_storyboard@581 — though the frontend uses the STREAMING stream-storyboard (FusionWorkshop.tsx:345), confirming the streaming-vs-nonstreaming question; (c) the proposed fix (add a red-team input box and thread payload.adversarialRules into the 4 request bodies) is valid and is the correct remediation.

finding.title: tweak-fusion-blocks：targetBlock (限定只改某块) + modifiedBlocks (可多块) [partial]
finding.file: targetBlock 已传（FusionWorkshop.tsx:304）且有 4 个目标切换按钮（:857-868）=接通；但 modifiedBlocks 被 :312-313 硬过滤为单一 target，后端合法的多块返回被丢弃，且空命中无反馈（bug 2）。
finding.detail: 保留 targetBlock 限定，但对返回处理改为应用后端实际 modifiedBlocks 中命中的块；空结果给出反馈。

verdict.evidence:
FusionWorkshop.tsx:304 sends `targetBlock: tweakTarget` in the request body (confirms targetBlock is wired). Lines 54-59 define BLOCKS with exactly 4 entries (worldviewBlock/protagonistBlock/antagonistBlock/narrativeTone); lines 857-868 `BLOCKS.map(...)` render one `<button onClick={() => setTweakTarget(key)}>微调目标: {label}</button>` per block = 4 target-switch buttons (confirms both halves of sub-claim 1).

The lossy return-handling is confirmed verbatim at FusionWorkshop.tsx:309-321:
```
const reported = (data.modifiedBlocks || []).filter((key): key is BlockKey => isBlockKey(key));
const targetOnly = reported.filter((key) => key === tweakTarget);   // :312 drops any block != tweakTarget
const effectiveKeys = targetOnly.length > 0 ? targetOnly : [];      // :313 empty hit -> apply nothing
effectiveKeys.forEach((key) => { if (typeof data[key] === 'string') next[key] = data[key] as string; });
...
setCommand('');                                                    // :321 input cleared with NO setError on empty
```
So any backend-returned block other than the current target is discarded (sub-claim 2), and when `targetOnly` is empty the try-block succeeds silently — no `setError`, no aria-live message — only `setCommand('')` fires, a silent no-op (sub-claim 3 / bug 2).

Backend corroboration: api/schemas.py:92-97 `TweakBlocksResponse.modifiedBlocks: List[str]` (multi-block is schema-legal); api/index.py:546-548 prompt says the instruction "可一个或多个" blocks and "modifiedBlocks 必须准确列出你实际修改的积木 ID" — so the backend can legitimately report multiple blocks. Nuance: api/index.py:533-538 — when `targetBlock` is present the backend ALSO injects a guard ("modifiedBlocks 只能包含 {targetBlock}"), so in the normal targeted path the model is told to return only the target; the frontend :312 filter is therefore mostly redundant with the backend constraint. The substantive, unambiguous defect is the empty-hit silent no-op at :313/:321.
verdict.correctedDescription: CONFIRMED. (1) targetBlock IS wired: FusionWorkshop.tsx:304 sends `targetBlock: tweakTarget`, and there are exactly 4 target-switch buttons rendered from the 4-entry BLOCKS array (:54-59, :857-868). (2) Return-handling is lossy: :312-313 filter the backend's `modifiedBlocks` down to only the currently-selected `tweakTarget`, so any other block the backend returns is dropped — true at the schema level (schemas.py:92 `modifiedBlocks: List[str]`, prompt allows "可一个或多个"). Caveat the original claim omits: when targetBlock is sent, the backend prompt itself (index.py:533-538) forces `modifiedBlocks` to contain only that target, so legitimate multi-block returns are an edge case (model disobedience), not the normal path; the frontend filter is largely redundant with that backend guard. (3) The clearly-correct defect (bug 2) is the empty-hit silent no-op: when zero blocks match, :313 yields `effectiveKeys = []`, nothing is written to state, yet the request succeeds and :321 clears the command box with no setError / no aria-live feedback — the user sees the input vanish but no block change and no explanation. Suggested fix per the claim still stands: apply whatever the backend actually reports in `modifiedBlocks` (relying on the backend's own single-target guard rather than re-filtering), and surface a message when the effective change set is empty.

finding.title: generate-storyboard (端点5, 非流式) [unused]
finding.file: 前端唯一 storyboard 调用是 streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard') (FusionWorkshop.tsx:345)；generate-storyboard 仅被后端在 SSE 解析失败时内部兜底调用（api/index.py:663-666）。前端 grep generate-storyboard = 0。
finding.detail: 属设计选择（前端走 SSE，非流式作服务端 fallback），可接受；但应在文档中澄清，避免再被当作前端入口。

verdict.evidence:
FusionWorkshop.tsx:333-371 — the sole storyboard generator `generateStoryboard()` calls `streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', { selectedDirection: selectedDirection(), sceneCount: 3 }, {...})` (lines 344-346). No `sceneCount` UI control: it is hardcoded to 3.
Frontend grep across all *.ts/*.tsx for `generate-storyboard` = 0 hits; only `storyboard` matches resolve to the SSE path (FusionWorkshop.tsx:43-937, all referencing stream-storyboard). So `generate-storyboard` has zero frontend entry points.
api/index.py:602-604 — `@app.post("/api/py/generate-storyboard")` -> `run_generate_storyboard(data, request, enforce_rate_limit=True)` (the public non-streaming endpoint, rate-limited via index.py:62 `(60, 12)`).
api/index.py:663-666 (inside `stream_storyboard`'s event_generator) — after the SSE stream ends, `scenes = parse_storyboard_scene_blocks(stream_buffer, data.sceneCount)`; `if not scenes:` then `fallback = await run_generate_storyboard(data, request, enforce_rate_limit=False)` and `scenes = [scene.model_dump() for scene in fallback.scenes]`. This is the only call site of the generate-storyboard logic, and it is server-internal (note enforce_rate_limit=False to avoid double-counting the SSE call's quota), triggered only when the structured parse of the streamed text yields nothing.
verdict.correctedDescription: Confirmed. The only frontend storyboard call is `streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', ...)` at FusionWorkshop.tsx:344-346 (function `generateStoryboard`, FusionWorkshop.tsx:333; sceneCount hardcoded to 3, no UI control). A frontend grep for `generate-storyboard` returns 0 hits. The non-streaming `generate-storyboard` endpoint (api/index.py:602-604) is exercised only as a server-side fallback: inside `stream_storyboard`'s event_generator, when `parse_storyboard_scene_blocks(stream_buffer, sceneCount)` returns empty, the code calls `run_generate_storyboard(..., enforce_rate_limit=False)` (api/index.py:663-666) and emits its scenes in the SSE `done` frame. Two minor refinements to the original locator: (a) the public POST handler is at index.py:602-604 while the fallback invocation is at index.py:663-666 — both correct as cited; (b) note the fallback passes `enforce_rate_limit=False` so it does not consume a second rate-limit slot. This is a deliberate design choice (frontend = SSE; non-streaming = resilience fallback when streamed output fails to parse), and is harmless/acceptable. Caveat: CLAUDE.md is partly stale here — it documents `generate-storyboard` as a real endpoint and its 12/60s rate limit, but its endpoint table and the FusionWorkshop description (CLAUDE.md:87,125) omit `stream-storyboard` entirely and imply the structured `generate-storyboard` is the storyboard step. The docs should be updated to mark `generate-storyboard` as an internal fallback and list `stream-storyboard` as the actual frontend storyboard endpoint, so it is not mistaken for a frontend entry point.

finding.title: stream-storyboard (端点6, SSE) + sceneCount(1-8) [partial]
finding.file: SSE 已接通（FusionWorkshop.tsx:344-362，含 onDone 取 scenes、解析失败兜底 :363-365）；但 sceneCount 写死 3（:346），后端 1-8 不可调；adversarialRules 缺失（:346 请求体未带）。
finding.detail: 暴露 sceneCount 选择 UI（1-8）；补 adversarialRules。

verdict.evidence:
FusionWorkshop.tsx:344-346 调用流式端点且写死 sceneCount：`await streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', { selectedDirection: selectedDirection(), sceneCount: 3 }, {...})` —— 请求体仅 selectedDirection + sceneCount，无 adversarialRules。

(1) SSE 接通：FusionWorkshop.tsx:348-351 onDelta 累加 streamedText；:352-360 onDone 先 normalizeScenesPayload(payload.scenes) 再回退 parseStoryboardStreamText(streamedText)（"onDone 取 scenes"属实）；:363-365 `if (!hasParsedScenes && parseStoryboardStreamText(streamedText).length === 0) setError('故事板流式完成，但未能解析分镜结构，请重试。')`（解析失败兜底属实）。streamSse 确实支持 onDone（llmClient.ts:161 `onDone?:`、:222 `handlers.onDone?.(event.payload)`）。前端用的是流式端点6 stream-storyboard，非端点5 generate-storyboard——CLAUDE.md:87 表格只列了 structured generate-storyboard，确未记载此 SSE 端点。

(2) sceneCount 写死 3：:346 字面量 `sceneCount: 3`；后端 schemas.py:139 `sceneCount: int = Field(3, ge=1, le=8)` 支持 1-8。全 components 目录 grep `setSceneCount|useState.*sceneCount|type="number"` 零命中——无任何 sceneCount 选择 UI。

(3) adversarialRules 缺失：全仓 grep `adversarialRules` 仅命中 api/schemas.py(81/107/139-140/153)、api/index.py(487/541/581/618-619/690 等)、CLAUDE.md——在任何 .tsx/.ts 前端文件中 0 命中。后端 stream-storyboard 明确支持（index.py:618-619 `if data.adversarialRules and data.adversarialRules.strip(): adv = ...`），但前端从不发送。FusionWorkshop 唯一可选 textarea 是 customPrompt(:734-740)→映射为 userCustomPrompt(:253)，与红队规则无关。注：adversarialRules 在前端对 3/4/5/6/7 全部端点均未发送（runTweak :302-306、collide :251-255 同样不带）。
verdict.correctedDescription: 论断三项全部属实，判 confirmed（标题的 [partial] 指能力状态：SSE 已通但缺 sceneCount/adversarialRules 控制，措辞准确）。具体核对：(1) SSE 确已接通——FusionWorkshop.tsx:344-362 经 streamSse 调用流式端点 `/api/py/stream-storyboard`（即端点6，非端点5），onDone(:352-360) 优先取 payload.scenes 再回退解析流文本，:363-365 为解析失败兜底报错；streamSse 的 onDone 在 llmClient.ts:161/222 真实存在。值得标注：CLAUDE.md(表格:87、:125 流程描述) 只提 generate-storyboard，未记载实际在用的 stream-storyboard SSE 端点，文档与代码不符。(2) sceneCount 确写死字面量 3（:346），后端支持 1-8（schemas.py:139 ge=1 le=8），前端无任何 sceneCount 选择 UI（components 全目录无 setSceneCount/number input）。(3) adversarialRules 确缺失——:346 请求体不含该字段，且全前端代码库（所有 .tsx/.ts）均无 adversarialRules 字样，后端 stream-storyboard 已实现该参数(index.py:618-619)却无前端入口。补充：CLAUDE.md:125 声称引力室有"反套路红队约束"UI，但代码中并不存在——唯一可选输入是 customPrompt→userCustomPrompt（:253/:734-740）。整改建议成立：应暴露 sceneCount(1-8) 选择 UI 并补 adversarialRules 输入（且该缺口实为端点 3/4/5/6/7 通用，非仅本端点）。

finding.title: stream-scene-text (端点7, SSE)：precedingTexts / currentDraft / resumeFromText [partial]
finding.file: precedingTexts 正确取前 1-2 镜（FusionWorkshop.tsx:379-382,394）→ 后端 index.py:264-266 消费=wired；currentDraft+resumeFromText 被发成同值（:395-396）→ 后端坍缩（index.py:269），两语义未区分；adversarialRules 缺失。
finding.detail: 区分续写/续传语义或去冗余；补 adversarialRules。precedingTexts 数值键经 JSON 变字符串后 Pydantic Dict[int,str] 可正确强转，非 bug。

verdict.evidence:
FILE PATHS in claim are wrong: actual files are components/FusionWorkshop.tsx and api/index.py (claim wrote bare "FusionWorkshop.tsx"/"index.py"). Line numbers themselves check out.

(1) precedingTexts = prior 1-2 scenes — CONFIRMED. components/FusionWorkshop.tsx:379-382: `const precedingTexts: Record<number, string> = {}; [num - 2, num - 1].forEach((n) => { if (n >= 1 && sceneTexts[n]) precedingTexts[n] = sceneTexts[n]; });`. Backend consumes it at api/index.py:264-266: `ordered = sorted(data.precedingTexts.items()); preceding = "\n\n".join(text for _, text in ordered ...); preceding = trim_text_tail(preceding, MAX_SCENE_CONTEXT_CHARS)`. WIRED.

(2) currentDraft + resumeFromText sent as SAME value — CONFIRMED. components/FusionWorkshop.tsx:395-396: `currentDraft: mode === 'resume' ? existingDraft : undefined, resumeFromText: mode === 'resume' ? existingDraft : undefined,`. Both are the identical `existingDraft = sceneTexts[num] || ''` (:377).

(3) Backend collapses them, two semantics not distinguished — CONFIRMED. api/index.py:269: `current_draft_raw = data.currentDraft or data.resumeFromText or ""`. There is no branch differentiating 分镜续写 vs 断点续传. Confirmed by test_scene_resume.py which only asserts both fields round-trip, never that they behave differently.

(4) "adversarialRules 缺失" — REFUTED as framed. The scene-text endpoint FULLY supports adversarialRules on the backend: schemas.py:153 `adversarialRules: Optional[str] = Field(None, max_length=2000)` AND handler api/index.py:689-691: `adv = ANTI_SLOP_CONSTRAINT; if data.adversarialRules and data.adversarialRules.strip(): adv += f"\n【用户红队对抗规则（必须遵守）】：{data.adversarialRules.strip()}"` then injected into system_prompt (:693-697). So nothing is "missing" from endpoint 7's API/backend. The real gap: the string `adversarialRules` appears ZERO times in the entire frontend — repo-wide grep shows matches ONLY in api/schemas.py (×4), api/index.py (×5 builders: 487-488 fusion, 541-542 tweak, 581-582 storyboard, 618-619 stream-storyboard, 690-691 scene), and CLAUDE.md. Not once in components/ or app/. So the frontend never sends adversarialRules to ANY of endpoints 3/4/5/6/7 — this is a frontend-wide omission, not a scene-text-specific capability gap. (Note CLAUDE.md's claim that FusionWorkshop has a "反套路红队约束" input is itself unimplemented.)

(5) Dict[int,str] JSON coercion note — CONFIRMED correct: schemas.py:150 `precedingTexts: Dict[int, str]`; Pydantic coerces JSON string keys back to int; not a bug.
verdict.correctedDescription:
stream-scene-text (端点7, SSE) 实况（核对 components/FusionWorkshop.tsx + api/index.py + api/schemas.py）：

精确的：(a) precedingTexts 取前 1-2 镜（FusionWorkshop.tsx:379-382）→ 后端消费（index.py:264-266）=完整 wired；(b) currentDraft 与 resumeFromText 前端被发成同一个 existingDraft（FusionWorkshop.tsx:395-396）→ 后端 `data.currentDraft or data.resumeFromText or ""`（index.py:269）坍缩为单值，"分镜续写"与"断点续传"两语义在前后端都未被区分（test_scene_resume.py 也只验证字段透传，不验证差异行为）。建议二选一去冗余或真正分流。

需纠正的核心点：原论断"adversarialRules 缺失"表述误导。端点7的后端对 adversarialRules 支持是完整的——schemas.py:153 已声明该字段，handler 在 index.py:689-691 把它拼进 system_prompt。所以端点7的 API/后端没有任何缺失。真正的缺口是：adversarialRules 这个标识符在整个前端（components/+app/）出现 0 次，前端对 3/4/5/6/7 全部端点都从不发送该字段——这是一个全前端范围的遗漏，而非 scene-text 端点的能力缺口。CLAUDE.md 所称 FusionWorkshop 含"反套路红队约束"输入框其实也未实现。

文件路径修正：实际为 components/FusionWorkshop.tsx 与 api/index.py（原论断写成裸文件名）。行号本身准确。precedingTexts 的 Dict[int,str] JSON 键强转结论正确，非 bug。

finding.title: 全端点公共：temperature (0-1.5) [unused]
finding.file: store.ts:65 字段存在但无 setter（仅 clampTemperature 在 hydration 用，:95-99/:142/:164）；SettingsPanel grep temperature = 0；llmClient.ts:74-76 始终把 runtimeConfig.temperature(=0.7 默认) 注入。CLAUDE.md 称『无 UI 控制』属实。
finding.detail: 如产品想要温度控制需在 SettingsPanel 加滑块 + store.setTemperature；否则明确这是有意冻结，消除『后端支持 0-1.5 却无入口』的意图歧义。

verdict.evidence: store.ts:65 `temperature: number;` exists in LLMConfig; default set via DEFAULT_TEMPERATURE=0.7 (store.ts:11,71). NO setter: AppState (store.ts:74-93) exposes only setActiveProvider + updateActiveProviderProfile; the latter's ProviderProfile patch handles only apiKey/baseUrl/model (store.ts:196-200). Repo-wide grep `setTemperature` = 0 matches. clampTemperature defined store.ts:95-99, used ONLY in hydration/migrate path normalizeLLMConfig at :142 and :164 — exactly as claimed. SettingsPanel.tsx grep `temperature` = 0 matches (component renders only provider/apiKey/baseUrl/model inputs, lines 60-122). llmClient.ts:74-76 `if (options?.includeTemperature !== false) { enrichedPayload.temperature = runtimeConfig.temperature; }` — and runtimeConfig.temperature = llmConfig.temperature (llmClient.ts:28). Repo-wide grep `includeTemperature: false` = 0 matches, so temperature(=0.7) is injected on EVERY LLM request, including the SSE path (streamSse → postWithLlmConfig at llmClient.ts:186 passes no includeTemperature). CLAUDE.md:38 (and :36): "`temperature` is sent and clamped to 0–1.5 but currently has no UI control; it stays at the 0.7 default." Broader `.tsx` scan for temp/0.7/1.5 yields only unrelated Tailwind/animation/timeout tokens — no slider/input.
verdict.correctedDescription: 完全属实。temperature 在 store.ts:65 作为 LLMConfig 字段存在，默认 0.7（store.ts:11,71）。无任何 setter：AppState（store.ts:74-93）只暴露 setActiveProvider 与 updateActiveProviderProfile，后者的 patch 仅覆盖 apiKey/baseUrl/model（store.ts:196-200）；全仓 grep setTemperature = 0。clampTemperature（store.ts:95-99）仅在 hydration/migrate 的 normalizeLLMConfig 内用于 :142 与 :164，运行时无写入路径。SettingsPanel.tsx 完全没有 temperature 字样（grep=0），UI 只渲染 provider/apiKey/baseUrl/model。llmClient.ts:74-76 通过 includeTemperature 门控注入 runtimeConfig.temperature，但全仓无任何调用方传 includeTemperature:false（grep=0），故 0.7 被注入到每一个 LLM 请求——包括 SSE 流式路径（streamSse→postWithLlmConfig，llmClient.ts:186 不传该参数；后端 stream-storyboard/stream-scene-text 等同样收到 temperature）。CLAUDE.md:38/:36 自陈『无 UI 控制、固定 0.7』属实。唯一可补充的细节：includeTemperature 这个『可关闭温度』的开关在代码里存在但从未被任何调用方使用（始终保持注入），不影响『有意冻结、无入口』的结论。若产品想开放温度控制，需在 SettingsPanel 加滑块 + 在 store 新增 setTemperature（或扩展 updateActiveProviderProfile，但当前 temperature 是 LLMConfig 平铺字段而非 per-provider，故更适合独立 setter）。

finding.title: 刷新后 DNA 提取陷入「假运行」死胡同：进度条+暂停键全部失效
finding.file: components/NovelDetail.tsx:186 (busy 判定) + :209 (pause) + :508 (busy 渲染分支)
finding.detail: busy = extracting || status==='mapping' || status==='reducing'（NovelDetail.tsx:186）。analysisStatus 持久化在 IndexedDB（db.ts:226-238）。Map/Reduce 进行中刷新页面后，status 仍是 'mapping'/'reducing'，于是 busy=true，渲染出旋转螺旋+进度条+「暂停测序」「阶段汇总」按钮（:508-637），但实际没有任何 runner 在跑（extracting=false、abortRef.current=null）。组件内 4 个 useEffect（:103/:111/:117/:150）都不会续跑提取，也不修复僵死状态。

verdict.evidence:
核心机制全部核实属实：

1) busy 判定 — NovelDetail.tsx:186: `const busy = extracting || status === 'mapping' || status === 'reducing';`（status = novel.analysisStatus，L185）。`extracting` 是 `useState(false)`（L85），刷新后必为 false，`abortRef` 是 `useRef<AbortController | null>(null)`（L91），刷新后必为 null。

2) analysisStatus 持久化在 IndexedDB — app/db.ts:224-240 (version(5)) 在 novels 表登记 `analysisStatus`；dnaEngine.ts:209 在 Map 开始即写 `analysisStatus:'mapping'`、:348 写 `'reducing'`。这些值由 Dexie 持久化，刷新后保留。（注：claim 写 db.ts:226-238，实际 v5 升级块为 224-240，226 仅是 stores 索引串那一行——位置近似但块边界略偏。）

3) busy 渲染分支 — NovelDetail.tsx:508 `{busy ? (` 进入双螺旋 SVG(L515)+进度条(L603-615)+「暂停测序」(L619-624 onClick={pause})+「阶段汇总」(L625-636 onClick={handleReduceEarly})。

4) 刷新后无任何 runner 在跑、按钮全失效：
   - pause (L209) = `abortRef.current?.abort()` → 刷新后 abortRef.current=null → no-op。
   - handleReduceEarly (L211-217) 只 `setShouldReduceEarly(true)`；监听该 flag 的订阅在 dnaEngine.ts:313-323，仅存在于 runDnaExtraction 调用生命周期内——无活跃 runner 时无人响应。
   - NovelDetail 仅有 4 个 useEffect（L103/111/117/150，已 grep 确认仅此 4 个），分别只做：feed/视图复位、卸载清定时器、构建 liveFeed、自动滚动；无一调用 runDnaExtraction 或修复 status。
   - 全仓 runDnaExtraction 调用点仅 2 处：NovelDetail.tsx:200(handleExtract，按钮触发) 与 NovelUploader.tsx:566(handleSingleChapterExtract，单章按钮触发)，均非挂载时自动续跑。store.ts 的 persist 不含 analysisStatus，挂载无状态修复。app/page.tsx 挂载亦无 resume 逻辑。

结论：Map/Reduce 进行中刷新 → status 仍为 'mapping'/'reducing' → busy=true 渲染「假运行」UI，但无 runner、两按钮皆死，且 dnaReady 分支(L187 `status==='done' && dnaCard`)进不去、CTA 提取按钮(L698-720 的 else 分支)也因 busy=true 被屏蔽——用户被锁死在假进度页。死胡同成立。
verdict.correctedDescription: 论断成立。刷新后陷入「假运行」死胡同确实存在：busy=extracting||status==='mapping'||status==='reducing'（NovelDetail.tsx:186），analysisStatus 由 IndexedDB 持久化（app/db.ts version(5) 升级块 L224-240，dnaEngine.ts:209/348 写入）。Map/Reduce 进行中刷新页面后 status 仍为 'mapping'/'reducing'，busy=true 渲染双螺旋+进度条+「暂停测序」「阶段汇总」（NovelDetail.tsx:508-637），但 extracting=false、abortRef.current=null、无任何 runner 在跑。pause()(:209) 因 abortRef=null 成空操作；handleReduceEarly()(:211) 仅置 store.shouldReduceEarly，而响应该 flag 的订阅(dnaEngine.ts:313)只在活跃 runDnaExtraction 内存在，刷新后无人响应。组件 4 个 useEffect（:103/:111/:117/:150）皆不续跑提取、不修复僵死状态；全仓 runDnaExtraction 仅 2 个按钮触发点(NovelDetail:200 / NovelUploader:566)，无挂载自动续跑；store 持久化不含 analysisStatus，page.tsx 挂载亦无修复。用户既进不了 dnaReady 分支(:187)，也因 busy=true 看不到重新提取 CTA(:698 else 分支)，被锁死。唯一更正：原文称持久化在「db.ts:226-238」，精确位置是 version(5) 升级块 L224-240（226 行只是 stores 索引串），属微小行号偏差，不影响结论。

finding.title: 微调命令「石沉大海」：模型未命中目标块时静默清空、无任何反馈
finding.file: components/FusionWorkshop.tsx:309-321 (runTweak 的 setBlocks 回调)
finding.detail: runTweak 把后端 modifiedBlocks 强行过滤成「只保留 == tweakTarget」(targetOnly, :312)，若为空则 effectiveKeys=[]（:313），不改任何块；但紧接着 setCommand('')（:321）清空输入框，且不 setError、不弹 toast。当模型判断该指令不影响目标块、或修改了别的块时，用户的指令直接消失、4 个积木纹丝不动、屏幕无任何解释。

verdict.evidence:
FusionWorkshop.tsx:295-329 runTweak. On a successful HTTP response the no-op path is real: line 311 `reported = (data.modifiedBlocks || []).filter(isBlockKey)`; line 312 `targetOnly = reported.filter(key => key === tweakTarget)`; line 313 `const effectiveKeys = targetOnly.length > 0 ? targetOnly : [];`; lines 314-318 only `next[key] = ...` for keys in effectiveKeys — so if effectiveKeys is empty, NO block changes. Line 321 `setCommand('')` clears the input unconditionally on success. No-feedback proof: setError is only nulled at start (line 298) and re-set inside catch (line 324); it is never called on a successful no-op, so the error banner (line 901 `{error &&

{error}

}`) and aria-live error branch (lines 896-897) never fire. No toast system exists in the entire repo (grep for toast|sonner|react-hot-toast across yaml-write/ returns zero — the only hits were the substring 'notify' inside NovelDetail/NovelUploader, no library). The cyan pulse is purely request-bound, not change-bound: `tweakingTarget` is set at line 300 and cleared in finally (line 327); the class `tweak-glow-pulse` / label '脉冲更新中' (FusionWorkshop.tsx:839,844) therefore signals 'request in flight', not 'content changed', and the block body text (line 849 `{blocks[key]}`) is byte-identical before/after a no-op. The aria-live region (lines 889-899) falls through to '创作流程就绪' on a no-op success — actively misleading. Backend corroboration: api/index.py:532-538 the prompt tells the model that when targetBlock is set, `modifiedBlocks 只能包含 {targetBlock}` and other cards must be null; schemas.py:92-97 TweakBlocksResponse requires `modifiedBlocks: List[str]`. So the genuine trigger is the model returning an empty/non-target modifiedBlocks (it judged the instruction irrelevant to the target block), which silently produces zero changes + cleared input + no message.
verdict.correctedDescription: Accurate as written; line numbers verified (runTweak 295-329; effectiveKeys=[] at :313; setBlocks no-op at :314-318; setCommand('') at :321). Precision refinements: (1) The realistic no-op trigger is the MODEL returning a modifiedBlocks that omits the target block (it judged the instruction doesn't affect the selected card, or rewrote a different card); the frontend's `targetOnly` filter (:312) is largely defensive because the backend prompt (index.py:533-538) already instructs the model to put only the targetBlock in modifiedBlocks. Either way, when targetOnly is empty, zero of the 4 blocks change. (2) Confirmed there is genuinely NO toast/notification system in the codebase, so the only possible success-feedback channels are the block content itself (unchanged on no-op) and setError (not called on a successful no-op). (3) The cyan 'tweak-glow-pulse' (:839,844) is bound to tweakingTarget, which is set before the request (:300) and cleared in finally (:327) regardless of result — it indicates 'request in flight', not 'something changed', so it does not compensate for the missing feedback. (4) Additionally, the sr-only aria-live region (:889-899) reports '创作流程就绪' after a no-op, so screen-reader users get a falsely-reassuring 'ready' message. Net effect exactly as claimed: instruction text is wiped, all 4 blocks are unchanged, and the UI shows no error, toast, or explanation.

finding.title: 「反套路红队约束」入口在已发布 UI 中根本不存在（与文档承诺断裂）
finding.file: components/FusionWorkshop.tsx:732-741 (只有 customPrompt 一个 textarea)
finding.detail: CLAUDE.md:125 明确称 FusionWorkshop 引力室有「自定义大方向 / 反套路红队约束」两路输入，后端 5 个创作端点都接 adversarialRules（schemas.py:81/107/140/153）。但实际引力室只有一个「偏航指令(可选)」textarea 绑定 customPrompt（:734-740），全前端 grep adversarialRules / 红队 = 0 命中。用户读了介绍想用红队对抗规则，UI 里完全找不到。

verdict.evidence:
CLAUDE.md (FusionWorkshop bullet, the "line 125" region) promises 引力室 has "optional 自定义大方向 / 反套路红队约束". Backend honors red-team rules: api/schemas.py:81 `adversarialRules: Optional[str]` (also :107,:140,:153), and api/index.py injects it into 5 prompt builders — :488 `【用户红队对抗规则（最高优先级，违反即重写）】`, :542/:582/:619/:691 `【用户红队对抗规则（必须遵守）】` (endpoints generate-fusion-directions / tweak-fusion-blocks / generate-storyboard / stream-storyboard / stream-scene-text).

But the frontend has NO such input. Grep `adversarialRules|红队|对抗规则|反套路` across all *.{ts,tsx,js,jsx} in /d/project/yaml-write = "No matches found" (0 hits). FusionWorkshop.tsx has exactly two text inputs: (1) the 引力室 textarea at :734 `<textarea value={customPrompt}` placeholder "自定义碰撞方向..." labeled :733 "偏航指令（可选）", and (2) the creator command bar at :871 `<input value={command}` for block-tweak instructions. Neither is a red-team channel.

The collide() payload at FusionWorkshop.tsx:251-255 sends only `{dnaCards, userCustomPrompt: customPrompt.trim()||undefined, fusionBias}` — `adversarialRules` is never populated or transmitted from anywhere in the client. So the "自定义大方向" half maps to the single customPrompt textarea, while the promised "反套路红队约束" half has no UI and no wiring at all.
verdict.correctedDescription: CONFIRMED with one factual tightening. CLAUDE.md's FusionWorkshop entry promises two 引力室 inputs ("自定义大方向 / 反套路红队约束") and the backend fully supports `adversarialRules` (schemas.py:81/107/140/153 — 4 schema lines, not 5; injected into 5 endpoints' prompts at index.py:488/542/582/619/691). The frontend exposes only ONE textarea (FusionWorkshop.tsx:734, bound to customPrompt) which maps solely to the `userCustomPrompt` field (sent at :253). There is zero `adversarialRules`/红队/对抗规则/反套路 anywhere in the entire frontend (grep across all ts/tsx/js/jsx = 0 hits), so the request body at :251-255 never includes adversarialRules. The "反套路红队约束" entry promised in the docs is genuinely absent and unreachable from the published UI — a real doc-vs-shipped journey break. The second FusionWorkshop input (command bar at :871) is unrelated (block-tweak userInstruction). Minor correction to the original claim: adversarialRules appears on 4 Pydantic schema lines (one shared schema covers both generate-storyboard and stream-storyboard), though it is wired into 5 creation endpoints — this does not affect the verdict.

label: 横切 UX：错误/空态/恢复/并发/响应式/文案/无障碍
slice: 横切 UX：错误/空态/恢复/并发/响应式/文案/无障碍（全组件：page / NovelUploader / NovelDetail / FusionWorkshop / SettingsPanel）
currentJourney:
真实用户旅程（带 file:line 锚点）：

1) 落地 / 配置。app/page.tsx:25 渲染主壳。侧边栏 aside 是 `hidden ... lg:flex`（page.tsx:81）——窄屏完全没有侧边栏、没有导入/工坊/设置入口，只剩 Ctrl/Cmd+, 打开设置（page.tsx:32-41）。SettingsPanel（SettingsPanel.tsx:12）是抽屉：选 provider、API Key（显/隐 85-91）、Base URL、模型（datalist 预设）。getLlmConfigError（llmClient.ts:33）做就绪校验，状态点在 page.tsx:151 与 header（166）。没有 temperature 任何 UI。

2) 导入 + 切分。未选小说时 NovelUploader 渲染拖拽舱（NovelUploader.tsx:1110-1185）。processFile（657）校验后缀/大小，起 Web Worker（691）+ 15s 看门狗（670-681），分阶段文案 stageLabelMap（613）。成功写 IndexedDB（710-740）并选中该小说。编码失败/Worker 异常→errorMsg（754-775）。

3) 章节校验台（manageMode）。左侧大纲树（1334-1523），按 mapStatus 显示 测序中/🧬/⚠️/精测 徽标。短章🔗缝合（1480）、长章✂️裁切（1500-1514）、批量合并（2056-2114，含确认弹窗+6s 撤销 toast 2024-2054）。巨型单章（>=8000字且<=1章）出现「✨智能语义拆分」（1212），handleSmartSplitClick→若密钥未就绪滑出水晶卡（1101-1107），否则 runSmartSplit 调 /api/py/split-recommend（1073），把推荐裁切点「预涂色」到阅读器（1742-1767）。单章精测 handleSingleChapterExtract（530）带本地 AbortController（563）但 UI 无中断入口。

4) DNA 提取（NovelDetail）。未就绪显示水晶卡提示（492-506）。就绪显示「快速提取(前100章)」/「深度全量测序」（705-717）→ handleExtract（189）建 AbortController（197）跑 runDnaExtraction。busy 时显示双螺旋+进度条（508-638）、Genomics Live Feed（644-696）、暂停（620 pause→abort）、阶段汇总（625 handleReduceEarly→setShouldReduceEarly）。429 时 dnaEngine.withRateLimitRetry 静默退避并点亮 store.rateLimited，NovelDetail.tsx:593 弹「云端拥挤已放缓」黄条+螺旋变黄。完成后五维 Tabs + 3D 翻转编辑卡（340-461），保存复用 db.novels.update（252），绿色 toast（738-747）。

5) 融合工坊（FusionWorkshop）。<2 部就绪→引导（446-466）。Step1 引力室选 2+ 部、2 部时显示引力轨+fusionBias 滑块（595-730）、偏航指令 textarea（734）→ collide 调 /api/py/generate-fusion-directions（251），写死 sceneCount=3 不在此。Step2 三方向卡（786-800）。Step3 四积木+微调命令条（tweak-fusion-blocks，302）→ 生成故事板 generateStoryboard 走 /api/py/stream-storyboard（345，SSE，失败后端自动回退非流式）→ 逐分镜 generateScene 走 /api/py/stream-scene-text（389，SSE），中断可「继续接写」（956-964），复制（954）/下载（955）。全流程组件级 useState，无 AbortController、无 IndexedDB 持久化。

journeyBreaks.title: 硬刷新/崩溃中途 DNA 提取后，小说永久卡在 mapping/reducing 死状态，无法恢复也无法重启
journeyBreaks.description: runDnaExtraction 一开始就把 analysisStatus 写成 'mapping'（dnaEngine.ts:208），但只有在『活动运行内 abort』(dnaEngine.ts:338/380) 或重切(NovelUploader.tsx:721/863) 才会回写 'idle'。NovelDetail 挂载时的 useEffect（103/111/117/150）只重置 liveFeed/定时器/滚动，全程没有任何『把陈旧 mapping/reducing 状态归正』的对账逻辑。一旦用户在测序中刷新页面或浏览器崩溃，novel.analysisStatus 永远停在 'mapping'，busy=extracting||mapping||reducing 恒为 true（NovelDetail.tsx:186），于是只显示进度面板，而『快速提取/深度全量测序』按钮被 `busy ? ... : (按钮)` 隐藏（508/698-718）。此时唯一的『暂停』按钮 pause()=abortRef.current?.abort()（209）中 abortRef 为 null（无运行中的 controller），点了毫无作用。
journeyBreaks.impact: 用户彻底卡死：进度条停在某个百分比、无运行 worker、无法暂停、无法继续、无法重新触发。唯一逃生路是去『章节微调裁切』里重切（runResplit 会清空全部章节与 dnaCard，NovelUploader.tsx:864-865）即销毁已测序进度。等于刷新一次=进度作废，与 dnaEngine『resumable，刷新/崩溃绝不丢进度』的设计承诺直接矛盾。

journeyBreaks.title: 章节列表里 mapStatus 卡在 'mapping' 的章节刷新后永久转圈且无重试入口
journeyBreaks.description: runWorker 在发请求前把章节写成 mapStatus:'mapping'（dnaEngine.ts:271），仅在 catch 到 abort 时回滚 'pending'（280）。硬刷新时进行中的章节定格在 'mapping'。NovelUploader 渲染时 `chapter.mapStatus==='mapping'` 直接显示『[🧬 测序中...]』转圈（1420-1426），而该分支里没有任何『精测/重试』按钮（精测按钮只在 done/error/pending 分支出现，1432/1454/1467）。
journeyBreaks.impact: 刷新后这些章节永远转圈、点不动，用户无法对其重新精测，只能整本重切。

journeyBreaks.title: 融合工坊全流程零持久化：刷新即丢失方向卡/积木/故事板/已生成正文
journeyBreaks.description: step/selectedIds/directions/blocks/storyboard/sceneTexts/sceneResumeStatus 全是组件级 useState（143-170），唯一持久化的是 store 里的 fusionBias。整个『碰撞→方向→四积木微调→故事板→逐分镜流式正文』链路没有任何 IndexedDB/localStorage 落盘。saveScene 仅触发浏览器下载（435-443），不写库。
journeyBreaks.impact: 用户辛苦流式生成的多段正文一旦刷新/误关/导航离开（点侧边栏任意项 setWorkshopOpen(false)）即全部蒸发，且无任何『未保存』警告。与本应用『一切持久化于浏览器(IndexedDB)』的核心承诺相悖。

journeyBreaks.title: UI 反复声称『反套路红队约束 adversarialRules』，但前端从未把它发给任何端点
journeyBreaks.description: 全仓 grep adversarialRules 在 components/ 下零命中（仅后端 index.py:487/541/581/618/690 接收）。collide/runTweak/generateStoryboard/generateScene 的请求体都没有 adversarialRules 字段。引力室只渲染了一个『偏航指令』textarea(customPrompt, 734) 并作为 userCustomPrompt 传(253)，根本没有红队规则输入框。CLAUDE.md 与工坊设计都把『反套路红队约束』列为引力室能力。
journeyBreaks.impact: 宣称存在的红队对抗能力对用户完全不可达；后端 3/4/5/6/7 五个端点的 adversarialRules 形同虚设。期望-实现脱节，让人困惑。

journeyBreaks.title: 窄屏（移动端）无任何全局导航：无法切换作品/进工坊/开设置（除快捷键）
journeyBreaks.description: 整个侧边栏 aside 用 `hidden w-56 ... lg:flex`（page.tsx:81），lg 以下完全不渲染。导入作品/作品列表/融合工坊/设置入口全在该侧边栏内。窄屏唯一能打开设置的途径是 Ctrl/Cmd+,(page.tsx:32-41)——移动端根本无物理键。header(160-169) 只有面包屑+LLM 状态，无菜单按钮。
journeyBreaks.impact: 移动端用户落地后只能看到当前主区（默认导入页），无法切到已有作品、无法进工坊、无法配置密钥，应用在窄屏基本不可用。

journeyBreaks.title: 故事板流式失败/解析失败时无『重试』按钮，需手动重新点『生成故事板』且已流出的文本不清
journeyBreaks.description: generateStoryboard 在 onDone 解析不出 scenes 时只 setError『未能解析分镜结构，请重试』(364)，catch 也只 setError(367)。但 storyboard 仍为空，页面不提供专门的重试按钮；流式过程中累积的 storyboardStreamText 在失败后仍残留显示在面板(921-933)，与 error 同时存在，且再次点击『生成故事板』会 setStoryboardStreamText('')(340) 又从头来。
journeyBreaks.impact: 失败后用户看到一段半截原始文本+一条错误，需自己理解要去顶部点『生成故事板』重来，路径不直观。

journeyBreaks.title: 『阶段汇总』后 shouldReduceEarly 直到本轮 finally 才复位，存在并发再触发竞态窗口
journeyBreaks.description: handleReduceEarly 只调 setShouldReduceEarly(true)(216)，复位依赖 runDnaExtraction 末尾 finally 的 resetSequencingState()(dnaEngine.ts:390)。在 Map→Reduce 切换那一刻，dnaEngine.ts:329 读 isReduceEarly 后继续走 Reduce，而 store.shouldReduceEarly 仍为 true 直到整轮结束。若用户此窗口内再点『快速提取/深度全量测序』触发新一轮 runDnaExtraction，新一轮 spawnWorkersIfNeeded 的 while 条件含 `!shouldReduceEarly`(dnaEngine.ts:302) 会因残留 true 而立即不派发 worker，Map 阶段瞬间『完成』并误入 Reduce。
journeyBreaks.impact: 极端时序下二次提取会被陈旧 early-reduce 标志污染、跳过 Map 直接 Reduce。属难复现但真实的并发状态串扰。

missingScenarios.scenario: 刷新/崩溃后恢复到上次进度（analysisStatus/mapStatus 对账）
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: dnaEngine 自称 resumable，章节级 mapStatus 确实落盘，但缺『挂载时把残留 mapping/reducing 归正为 idle/pending 并提示继续』的对账。没有它，刷新就是死状态（见 journeyBreaks 第1/2条）。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: 无任何对账 effect；novel 卡 mapping、chapter 卡 mapping 永久转圈。

missingScenarios.scenario: 额度耗尽 / 持续 429（融合工坊侧）
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: 工坊四个 LLM 调用(directions/tweak/storyboard/scene)对 429 没有任何退避或友好提示，与 dnaEngine 的静默退避护航(dnaEngine.ts:85-119)严重不一致。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: 429 仅经 readApiErrorMessage 透出后端 rate_limited 文案为普通红字 error（FusionWorkshop.tsx:256/307/367/411），无重试、无 rateLimited 黄条（store.rateLimited 只在 NovelDetail.tsx:593 被消费）。

missingScenarios.scenario: 网络中断 / 流式连接半路断开后的工坊体验
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: streamSse 对『有 delta 但无 done』抛 resumable=true 的 StreamSseError(llmClient.ts:227-231)，scene 可『继续接写』；但故事板(stream-storyboard)断流没有续写概念，且全无 AbortController 让用户主动取消卡死的流。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: scene 断流可接写(956)；storyboard 断流只能整体重来；任何流都无『停止』按钮，hang 住只能刷新（刷新即丢全部，见上）。

missingScenarios.scenario: 只有一本书有 DNA（素材不足）
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: 这是常见中间态，引导是否清晰决定用户能否继续。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: 已处理：FusionWorkshop.tsx:446-466 显示『当前 X 部，还需 Y 部』并给『继续提取 DNA →』跳到 firstIncompleteNovel(141)。处理较好，但若所有 novel 都 done 而总数仍<2，firstIncompleteNovel 回退到 novels[0] 也能跳转，可接受。

missingScenarios.scenario: 巨型单章 / 分章失败（>=8000字且仅1章）
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: 核心边界，决定能否抢救分章失败的小说。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: 已较完整处理：canSmartSplit(NovelUploader.tsx:192-195) 触发『智能语义拆分』调 split-recommend(1073)，预涂色裁切点(1742)，物理裁切复用原子事务(963-1044)。单章>30000字精测被拦(550-557)。覆盖良好。

missingScenarios.scenario: 部分章节出错（failures>0）后的继续重试
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: 长篇必然有个别章节失败，需能只重试失败章节。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: dnaEngine.ts:342-344 抛『有 N 个章节解析失败，请点击继续提取重试失败章节』；NovelDetail 把它 setError 显示(202)。重试入口是再点『快速/全量提取』(targets=mapStatus!=='done' 595→只跑未完成)。逻辑通，但提示里说的『继续提取』并无同名按钮，文案与实际按钮名不符。

missingScenarios.scenario: 复制到剪贴板失败 / 非安全上下文
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: navigator.clipboard 在非 https 或无权限时会 reject。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: copyScene(FusionWorkshop.tsx:431-433) 既无 await/catch 也无成功 toast，完全静默；用户不知复制成功与否。

missingScenarios.scenario: 导出 TXT 文件名非法/为空
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: sceneTitle 来自模型，可能含 / \ : 或为空。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: saveScene 直接用 `${scene.sceneTitle || 'scene'}.txt`(FusionWorkshop.tsx:440)，未做文件名清洗，特殊字符可能导致下载异常或被浏览器截断。

missingScenarios.scenario: 编码识别失败（神秘编码）
missingScenarios.whyItMatters: 中文盗版 TXT 编码混乱常见。
missingScenarios.currentBehavior: 已处理：15s 看门狗超时给『此文档编码极度神秘...』(NovelUploader.tsx:679)，Worker error 兜底(766-775)。覆盖良好。

bugs.title: 崩溃/刷新后 analysisStatus 永久停留 mapping/reducing，UI 死锁（无运行 worker，暂停为空操作）
bugs.line: 208-211 (置 mapping) / 338,380 (仅运行内回 idle)；消费见 components/NovelDetail.tsx:186,209,508,698
bugs.description: analysisStatus 写入 'mapping'/'reducing' 后，唯一回写 'idle' 的路径都在『同一次活动运行内』。无任何挂载对账逻辑把陈旧状态归正。刷新后 busy 恒 true → 提取按钮被隐藏，pause()=abortRef.current?.abort() 因 abortRef=null 成空操作。
bugs.repro: 选一本多章小说点『深度全量测序』→ 测序途中按 F5 刷新 → 进入该小说详情：进度条停住、双螺旋仍转、只有暂停/阶段汇总按钮、点暂停无效、无重新开始按钮，永久卡死。
bugs.fixSketch: 在 NovelDetail 挂载（或 db 升级）时做一次对账：若 novel.analysisStatus∈{mapping,reducing} 且当前无活动运行，则 db.novels.update 回 'idle'，并把 chapters 中 mapStatus==='mapping' 回 'pending'，随后展示『继续提取』。可在 page/NovelDetail 的 useEffect 内基于 selectedNovelId 触发一次性 reconcile。

bugs.title: 章节 mapStatus 卡 'mapping' 刷新后永久转圈且无重试按钮
bugs.description: 章节在发请求前被置 'mapping'，仅 abort 分支回 'pending'(280)。刷新后定格 'mapping'，NovelUploader 该分支只渲染转圈、无精测/重试按钮。
bugs.repro: 测序途中刷新 → 进『章节微调裁切』：进行中那几章一直显示『[🧬 测序中...]』转圈，hover 也无精测按钮，点不动。
bugs.fixSketch: 同上 reconcile：挂载时把孤儿 mapping 章节批量回 pending；或在 'mapping' 渲染分支也提供『重置/重试』入口。

bugs.title: 融合工坊四个 LLM 调用未挂 AbortController，卸载后仍 setState 且无法取消流式
bugs.line: 344-362,389-409 (streamSse 未传 signal) ；mountedRef 仅用于 collide 路径(259/268/273)
bugs.description: StreamSseHandlers.signal 可选(llmClient.ts:163)但工坊从不传。generateStoryboard/generateScene 的 onDelta 回调直接 setStoryboardStreamText/setSceneTexts(350/403)，组件卸载后 fetch 仍在跑、回调继续 setState（这两条路径无 mountedRef 守卫），且用户无任何『停止生成』按钮来中断 hang 住的流。
bugs.repro: 点『生成正文』开始流式 → 立刻点侧边栏『+导入作品』(setWorkshopOpen(false)) 卸载工坊 → 后台流仍持续触发 setState（React 警告/无谓网络），且原本无法主动中断该请求。
bugs.fixSketch: 新增 useRef<AbortController>，generateStoryboard/generateScene 各建一个并通过 handlers.signal 传入 streamSse；卸载 useEffect 里 abort；onDelta/onDone 前判 mountedRef。UI 增加『停止生成』按钮调用 abort。

bugs.title: 融合工坊对 429 无退避/无护航提示，错误处理与 dnaEngine 不一致
bugs.description: collide/runTweak/generateStoryboard/generateScene 对 429 不做特殊处理，直接经 readApiErrorMessage 把 rate_limited 当普通错误红字抛出。dnaEngine 对 429 有静默指数退避+rateLimited 黄条护航(dnaEngine.ts:85-119,127-129)，工坊完全没有，且 store.rateLimited 只在 NovelDetail 消费。
bugs.repro: 对同一方向连续快速点『生成故事板』超过 12 次/60s 触发 429 → 仅得一条红色错误，无自动重试、无『云端拥挤』提示，与 DNA 提取阶段体验割裂。
bugs.fixSketch: 抽取 dnaEngine 的 withRateLimitRetry 思路为通用 helper，或在 streamSse/postWithLlmConfig 层对 429 统一退避并复用 setRateLimited，使工坊与提取阶段一致。

bugs.title: 复制按钮静默无反馈、无错误处理
bugs.description: copyScene 调 navigator.clipboard.writeText 但既不 await 也不 catch，且无任何成功 toast。非安全上下文/无权限时 reject 被吞，用户以为复制成功。
bugs.repro: 点分镜『复制』→ 无任何视觉反馈；在 http(非 localhost) 部署下静默失败。
bugs.fixSketch: await writeText 并 try/catch，成功弹『已复制』toast，失败提示手动选择复制。

bugs.title: 下载 TXT 未清洗文件名，sceneTitle 含非法字符或为空时下载异常
bugs.description: anchor.download = `${scene.sceneTitle || 'scene'}.txt`，sceneTitle 来自模型，可能含 / \ : * ? 或换行，未做 sanitize。
bugs.repro: 生成的分镜标题含『/』或为多行时点『下载』，文件名被截断或保存异常。
bugs.fixSketch: 对文件名做 replace(/[\\/:*?"<>|\n]/g,'_') 截断长度后再用。

bugs.title: 失败提示文案『请点击继续提取』与实际按钮名（快速提取/深度全量测序）不一致
bugs.description: 抛错文案『请点击继续提取重试失败章节』，但 NovelDetail 实际按钮叫『快速提取(前100章)』『深度全量测序』(NovelDetail.tsx:707/713)，无任何叫『继续提取』的控件。
bugs.repro: 制造个别章节失败 → 看到提示找『继续提取』按钮，界面没有，造成困惑。
bugs.fixSketch: 统一文案为实际按钮名，或新增明确的『继续提取/重试失败章节』按钮。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: adversarialRules（红队对抗规则）可附加到 generate-fusion-directions / tweak-fusion-blocks / generate-storyboard / stream-storyboard / stream-scene-text
capabilityGaps.evidence: 后端接收：api/index.py:487,541,581,618,690。前端：components/ 下 grep adversarialRules 零命中；collide(FusionWorkshop.tsx:251-255)、runTweak(302-306)、generateStoryboard(344-346)、generateScene(389-397) 请求体均无该字段。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 在引力室加『反套路红队约束』输入并贯穿四个端点请求体；否则该后端能力对用户完全不可达，与设计/CLAUDE.md 描述不符。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: generate-storyboard / stream-storyboard 的 sceneCount（1-8 可调分镜数）
capabilityGaps.evidence: 前端写死 `sceneCount: 3`（FusionWorkshop.tsx:346）；后端 data.sceneCount 驱动 prompt（api/index.py:584,622,631）。无任何 UI 让用户选 1-8。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 提供分镜数选择器（1-8），传入 stream-storyboard；当前固定 3 浪费后端可调能力。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: temperature（后端支持 0-1.5，按请求体生效）
capabilityGaps.evidence: llmClient.ts:74-76 会把 temperature 注入请求体，store 默认 0.7 且 clampTemperature 到 0-1.5（store.ts:95-99）；但 SettingsPanel 与水晶卡均无任何 temperature 控件（SettingsPanel.tsx 全文/NovelUploader.tsx 水晶卡 1912-2008 仅 key/baseUrl/model）。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 确认 CLAUDE.md『前端无 UI 控制』属实——已核实：永远 0.7。如需创作多样性应加滑块。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: split-recommend（JIT 语义拆分推荐，CLAUDE.md 未记载）
capabilityGaps.evidence: 已接入：NovelUploader.tsx:1073 postWithLlmConfig('/api/py/split-recommend', {paragraphs, novelName})，结果过滤/排序(1081-1088)并预涂色渲染(1742-1767)。段落下标与阅读器推导一致(1052-1062 vs 929-941)。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 无需改动；CLAUDE.md 应补记此端点（与 8 端点实况一致）。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: stream-storyboard（SSE 流式故事板，CLAUDE.md 表格漏列）
capabilityGaps.evidence: 前端用的是流式：FusionWorkshop.tsx:345 streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', ...)，依赖后端无 scenes 时自动回退非流式 generate-storyboard（api/index.py:663-667 yield done{scenes}）。streamSse 对『仅 done 无 delta』也能正常收尾（llmClient.ts:220-227）。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 无需改动；确认前端走流式而非 generate-storyboard。CLAUDE.md 应补记 stream-storyboard。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: generate-storyboard（非流式）
capabilityGaps.evidence: 前端无直接调用 generate-storyboard 的代码（仅作为后端 stream-storyboard 的内部回退）。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 保持现状；它由后端在解析失败时兜底，前端无需直连。

capabilityGaps.backendCapability: store.rateLimited 限速护航灯（全局可消费）
capabilityGaps.evidence: 仅 NovelDetail.tsx:593（提取阶段黄条）与螺旋变黄(515)消费；FusionWorkshop/NovelUploader 的 LLM 调用既不点亮也不消费 rateLimited。
capabilityGaps.recommendation: 工坊与智能拆分阶段也接入 rateLimited 护航，保证全局 429 体验一致。

interactionGaps.title: 刷新后无『恢复/继续』可见性，且 busy 死状态下无逃生入口
interactionGaps.description: busy 由 analysisStatus 派生，陈旧 mapping 状态导致提取按钮被隐藏、暂停无效，界面不提供『重新开始/继续/重置状态』任何控件，用户无可见出路（详见 bugs#1）。

interactionGaps.title: 流式生成（故事板/分镜正文）缺『停止/取消』按钮
interactionGaps.description: 生成中按钮只是 disabled，无中断手段；流 hang 住时用户只能刷新，而刷新会丢失工坊全部未持久化状态。

interactionGaps.title: 工坊已生成正文无『未保存』提示，导航离开/刷新静默丢失
interactionGaps.description: sceneTexts 仅在内存，离开工坊或刷新即丢；无 beforeunload 警告、无自动落盘、无『已生成 N 段』状态留存。

interactionGaps.title: 复制成功/失败无反馈
interactionGaps.description: copyScene 无 toast、无 catch，用户无法确认是否复制成功（对比下载有真实文件落地）。

interactionGaps.title: 单章精测（handleSingleChapterExtract）进行中无中断入口
interactionGaps.description: 本地建了 AbortController(563) 但 UI 不暴露任何取消按钮；精测中只能等其完成或失败，processing 锁住整片大纲(1336)。

interactionGaps.title: 工坊故事板流式失败后状态混乱：错误红字 + 残留半截原文 + 无专用重试
interactionGaps.description: 解析失败时 error 与 storyboardStreamText 并存显示，重试需回顶部点『生成故事板』，缺少就地『重试』按钮与失败态清理。

interactionGaps.title: 窄屏缺少导航触发器（汉堡菜单）
interactionGaps.description: 侧边栏 lg 以下隐藏，header 无菜单按钮，移动端无法切换作品/进工坊/开设置（详见 journeyBreaks#5）。

finding.title: 崩溃/刷新后 analysisStatus 永久停留 mapping/reducing，UI 死锁（无运行 worker，暂停为空操作）
finding.file: app/dnaEngine.ts
finding.line: 208-211 (置 mapping) / 338,380 (仅运行内回 idle)；消费见 components/NovelDetail.tsx:186,209,508,698
finding.detail: analysisStatus 写入 'mapping'/'reducing' 后，唯一回写 'idle' 的路径都在『同一次活动运行内』。无任何挂载对账逻辑把陈旧状态归正。刷新后 busy 恒 true → 提取按钮被隐藏，pause()=abortRef.current?.abort() 因 abortRef=null 成空操作。
finding.repro: 选一本多章小说点『深度全量测序』→ 测序途中按 F5 刷新 → 进入该小说详情：进度条停住、双螺旋仍转、只有暂停/阶段汇总按钮、点暂停无效、无重新开始按钮，永久卡死。

verdict.evidence:
所有引用行逐一核对，因果链完整成立。

(1) 置 mapping —— app/dnaEngine.ts:208-211（提取一开始即写持久库）：
```
await db.novels.update(novelId, {
  analysisStatus: 'mapping',
  mapProgress: { total: progressTotal, current: progressBase },
});
```

(2) 唯一回写 idle 的两条路径都在「同一次活动运行内」：
- dnaEngine.ts:337-340 —— `if (signal.aborted) { await db.novels.update(novelId,{analysisStatus:'idle'}); return; }`（mapPhasePromise resolve 之后，依赖本次运行的 signal）
- dnaEngine.ts:378-382 —— Reduce 阶段 catch 内 `if (signal.aborted) { ...idle... }`
另有 idle 写入仅在 NovelUploader.tsx:721（新建上传 db.novels.add）与:863（runResplit 重切重置），均非「打开详情对账」路径。

(3) busy 与刷新后状态 —— components/NovelDetail.tsx:
- L85 `const [extracting, setExtracting] = useState(false);` → 刷新后 extracting=false
- L91 `const abortRef = useRef<AbortController | null>(null);` → 刷新后 abortRef.current=null，仅 handleExtract(L198 `abortRef.current = controller`) 才会赋值
- L185-186 `const status = novel.analysisStatus;`（来自 useLiveQuery 读 IndexedDB 持久值）；`const busy = extracting || status === 'mapping' || status === 'reducing';` → status 持久为 'mapping' ⇒ busy=true

(4) UI 死锁 ——
- L187 `dnaReady = status==='done' && novel.dnaCard` 为 false ⇒ 进入提取视图（三元分支 L463 `) : (`）
- L508 `{busy ? (` 进度 UI（双螺旋 SVG L515 helix-dot 持续 animation、进度条 L605、暂停/阶段汇总按钮 L619-637）
- L698 `) : (` else 分支才渲染「快速提取/深度全量测序」按钮(L705-716) → busy=true 时被隐藏，无重新开始入口
- L209 `const pause = () => abortRef.current?.abort();` → abortRef.current=null ⇒ 空操作
- 逃生路径阶段汇总 L626 onClick={handleReduceEarly}→setShouldReduceEarly(true)，但响应它的订阅 dnaEngine.ts:313-323 仅存在于活动 runDnaExtraction 内，刷新后无运行 worker、无订阅 ⇒ 同样不写库；且 reducing 态下该按钮 L627 `disabled` 含 `status==='reducing'`。

(5) 无任何挂载对账：NovelDetail 的 4 个 useEffect(L103/111/117/150) 均不写 analysisStatus；app/page.tsx 无相关 effect；app/db.ts v5(L229-239)/v6(L243-250) upgrade 仅在 schema 版本升级时对「缺失」字段补默认值(`novel.analysisStatus = novel.analysisStatus || 'idle'`)，绝不把既有 'mapping'/'reducing' 归正。
verdict.correctedDescription:
论断成立。崩溃/刷新后 analysisStatus 持久停留 'mapping' 或 'reducing'，UI 永久死锁，无自动恢复路径：

- 持久化时机：runDnaExtraction 一开始即把 analysisStatus 写入 'mapping'（dnaEngine.ts:209），落盘到 IndexedDB。
- 唯一归 idle 的两处（dnaEngine.ts:338、380）都包在本次运行的 `if (signal.aborted)` 内，进程结束/刷新后该函数早已不在执行，无人触发。
- 刷新后 NovelDetail 重新挂载：extracting 复位为 false（useState 默认值），但 status 经 useLiveQuery 从持久库读回 'mapping'，故 busy=true（L186）。
- busy=true ⇒ 渲染进度视图（L508 分支）：双螺旋 SVG 仍按 CSS animation 旋转、进度条停在断点比例、只显示「暂停测序」「阶段汇总」两个按钮；承载「快速提取/深度全量测序」的 else 分支(L698-)被隐藏，无重新开始入口。
- 「暂停」无效：pause()=abortRef.current?.abort()，而 abortRef 刷新后为 null（仅 handleExtract 内赋值），故为空操作（L91/198/209）。
- 「阶段汇总」也无法解套：它只 setShouldReduceEarly(true)，而监听该 flag 的 store 订阅(dnaEngine.ts:313-323)仅在活动运行内注册，刷新后不存在；且 reducing 态下该按钮本身 disabled。
- 无任何挂载对账：组件 effect、page.tsx、db.ts 迁移皆不把陈旧 'mapping'/'reducing' 归正（迁移只对缺失字段补 'idle' 默认值）。
两处 idle 写入存在于 NovelUploader（新建上传/一键重切），需用户主动切到「章节微调裁切」管理视图触发，并非详情页自愈——与复现路径不符，故死锁成立。补充：reducing 卡死场景下进度文案显示「凝聚全书五维 DNA 终章结晶...」、进度条强制 100%（L607）、阶段汇总按钮 disabled，仅余无效的暂停键。

finding.title: 章节 mapStatus 卡 'mapping' 刷新后永久转圈且无重试按钮
finding.file: app/dnaEngine.ts
finding.detail: 章节在发请求前被置 'mapping'，仅 abort 分支回 'pending'(280)。刷新后定格 'mapping'，NovelUploader 该分支只渲染转圈、无精测/重试按钮。
finding.repro: 测序途中刷新 → 进『章节微调裁切』：进行中那几章一直显示『[🧬 测序中...]』转圈，hover 也无精测按钮，点不动。

verdict.evidence:
CONFIRMED across 3 files. (1) Stuck state is written before the request and only rolled back inside a live run — app/dnaEngine.ts:271 `await db.chapters.update(chapter.id, { mapStatus: 'mapping' });` (set immediately, before `withRateLimitRetry(...mapOneChapter...)` at 272). The ONLY path back to 'pending' is the abort branch at 277-280: `if (linkedSignal.aborted) { await db.chapters.update(chapter.id, { mapStatus: 'pending' }); ... }`. After a hard refresh/crash the worker loop is gone, no abort fires, so the IndexedDB row stays `mapStatus:'mapping'` permanently. There is NO mount-time reconciliation anywhere (grep for reconcile/resumeOnLoad/runDnaExtraction-on-mount finds none; NovelDetail.tsx useEffects at 103-163 only touch feed/timers). (2) The render branch has no button — components/NovelUploader.tsx:1420-1426: `{ (chapter.mapStatus === 'mapping' || localExtractingMap[chapter.id]) ? (
[🧬 测序中...]
) : ...`. Compare the sibling branches which ALL render a 精测 button: `done` (1432-1442), `error` (1454-1464), default/pending (1467-1477). So 'mapping' is the unique branch with spinner-only, no 精测/重试. `localExtractingMap` defaults to `{}` (NovelUploader.tsx:103) and is only set true during an active single-chapter run (560), so after refresh the spinner is driven purely by the persisted `chapter.mapStatus==='mapping'`. (3) Both recovery paths are blocked after refresh: - Global re-extract CTA is hidden: NovelDetail.tsx:209 persists `analysisStatus:'mapping'`; on reload NovelDetail.tsx:186 `const busy = extracting || status === 'mapping' || status === 'reducing'` → busy=true → the busy progress UI renders (508) instead of the 全速提取/深度全量提取 CTA. The only control is 暂停测序 → `pause = () => abortRef.current?.abort()` (209) but `abortRef.current` is null after refresh, so pause is a no-op and never resets analysisStatus to idle (idle is only set inside live aborts at dnaEngine.ts:338/380). - Single-chapter 精测 is double-blocked: even if a button existed, handleSingleChapterExtract early-returns when `activeNovel?.analysisStatus === 'mapping'` (NovelUploader.tsx:533-540, toast '已有一个全局分析任务在后台运行中').
verdict.correctedDescription: 准确。章节在发请求前于 dnaEngine.ts:271 被置 'mapping'，唯一回滚到 'pending' 的是 277-280 的 abort 分支（需运行中的 linkedSignal.aborted 触发）。硬刷新/崩溃后 worker 已消失、无 abort，IndexedDB 行永久定格 'mapping'，且无任何挂载时复位逻辑。NovelUploader.tsx:1420-1426 的 'mapping' 分支只渲染转圈 + [🧬 测序中...]，是唯一没有 精测/重试 按钮的分支（done/error/pending 三分支均有 精测）。两条补救路径在刷新后都被堵死：(a) 全局重提取 CTA 因 analysisStatus 持久化为 'mapping' → busy=true 而被进度态遮蔽，唯一的『暂停测序』因刷新后 abortRef.current 为 null 而成空操作，无法把状态复位为 idle；(b) 即便有按钮，单章精测 handleSingleChapterExtract 在 analysisStatus==='mapping' 时（NovelUploader.tsx:533）直接 return 弹 toast。补充一点：单章精测路径里的 ensureIncrementalHashes(dnaEngine.ts:157-162) 与 single-chapter targets(195) 本可把任意状态的目标章重测，但因 mapping 分支无按钮、且 533 守卫拦截，用户根本触发不到。故论断中『永久转圈、无重试按钮、hover 也无精测、点不动』完全属实。

finding.title: 融合工坊四个 LLM 调用未挂 AbortController，卸载后仍 setState 且无法取消流式
finding.file: components/FusionWorkshop.tsx
finding.line: 344-362,389-409 (streamSse 未传 signal) ；mountedRef 仅用于 collide 路径(259/268/273)
finding.detail: StreamSseHandlers.signal 可选(llmClient.ts:163)但工坊从不传。generateStoryboard/generateScene 的 onDelta 回调直接 setStoryboardStreamText/setSceneTexts(350/403)，组件卸载后 fetch 仍在跑、回调继续 setState（这两条路径无 mountedRef 守卫），且用户无任何『停止生成』按钮来中断 hang 住的流。
finding.repro: 点『生成正文』开始流式 → 立刻点侧边栏『+导入作品』(setWorkshopOpen(false)) 卸载工坊 → 后台流仍持续触发 setState（React 警告/无谓网络），且原本无法主动中断该请求。

verdict.evidence:
app/llmClient.ts:159-163 — streamSse 的 signal 在 StreamSseHandlers 里且可选：`export interface StreamSseHandlers { onDelta: (text: string) => void; onDone?: (payload: SseEventPayload) => void; signal?: AbortSignal; }`；streamSse 把它透传给 fetch：app/llmClient.ts:186 `const response = await postWithLlmConfig(endpoint, payload, { signal: handlers.signal });`。

FusionWorkshop.tsx:344-362 generateStoryboard 调用 streamSse 时只传 `{ onDelta, onDone }`，无 signal；onDelta(348-351) `setStoryboardStreamText((prev) => prev + applyAntiSlopFallback(text))` 无任何 mountedRef 守卫。

FusionWorkshop.tsx:389-409 generateScene 同样只传 `{ onDelta }`，无 signal；onDelta(399-407) `setSceneTexts((prev) => ({ ...prev, [num]: (prev[num] || '') + sanitized }))` 无 mountedRef 守卫。

mountedRef 仅在 collide 路径被读取：声明 174、卸载置 false 190、读取 240/259/268/273（全在 collide 函数体 221-277 内）；grep `mountedRef` 仅这 6 处，runTweak/generateStoryboard/generateScene 内一次都没用。

grep `signal|abort|AbortController|停止|中断|取消|cancel` 在整个 FusionWorkshop.tsx 中：signal/abort/AbortController 0 处命中；“中断”仅出现在错误文案(418,895)。即既无 AbortController 也无『停止生成』按钮。

卸载路径属实：app/page.tsx:87-96 “+ 导入作品”按钮 onClick 调 setWorkshopOpen(false)(行90)，翻转 app/page.tsx:172 的 `workshopOpen ? <FusionWorkshop /> : ...` 条件渲染 → 卸载工坊；此时 streamSse 的 while(!done) 读循环仍在跑并继续触发 onDelta→setState。

唯一需修正点：package.json:23-24 react/react-dom 为 18.3.1。React 18 已移除“Can't perform a React state update on an unmounted component”警告，故卸载后的 setState 是静默 no-op，不会打印 React 警告（claim 描述的“React 警告”不成立）。但浪费的网络/流式与按用户 BYOK key 计费的 token、以及无法主动中断 hang 住的流，均成立。
verdict.correctedDescription: 属实的 bug，仅一处症状需修正。两条流式路径 generateStoryboard(FusionWorkshop.tsx:344-362) 与 generateScene(:389-409) 调用 streamSse 时均未传 StreamSseHandlers.signal(可选, llmClient.ts:162)，且 onDelta 回调(:350 setStoryboardStreamText / :403 setSceneTexts)无 mountedRef 守卫——mountedRef 虽在卸载时正确置 false(:190)，但只在 collide(:240/259/268/273)被读取，对两条 stream 路径零保护。组件也未挂任何 AbortController，UI 上也没有『停止生成』按钮（整文件 signal/abort/cancel 0 命中）。复现属实：流式中点侧栏“+导入作品”→ page.tsx:90 setWorkshopOpen(false) → page.tsx:172 条件渲染卸载工坊，但后台 fetch/SSE 仍在 while(!done) 中持续读取并 onDelta→setState，无法主动中断，且持续消耗用户 BYOK key 的 token 与网络。修正点：项目用 React 18.3.1(package.json:23-24)，React 18 已移除“在已卸载组件上 setState”的告警，故卸载后的 setState 实为静默 no-op，不会产生 React 控制台警告——claim 中“React 警告”这一症状不准确；其余（无谓网络/流式开销、计费、无法取消、无停止按钮、缺 mountedRef 守卫）全部成立。后端侧：stream-storyboard 确为前端实际使用的 SSE 端点（FusionWorkshop.tsx:345），与待核查无冲突。

finding.title: adversarialRules（红队对抗规则）可附加到 generate-fusion-directions / tweak-fusion-blocks / generate-storyboard / stream-storyboard / stream-scene-text [unused]
finding.file: 后端接收：api/index.py:487,541,581,618,690。前端：components/ 下 grep adversarialRules 零命中；collide(FusionWorkshop.tsx:251-255)、runTweak(302-306)、generateStoryboard(344-346)、generateScene(389-397) 请求体均无该字段。
finding.detail: 在引力室加『反套路红队约束』输入并贯穿四个端点请求体；否则该后端能力对用户完全不可达，与设计/CLAUDE.md 描述不符。

verdict.evidence:
Backend accepts adversarialRules on all 5 cited endpoints (Optional[str], max_length=2000 in schemas, appended to prompt in index.py):
- generate-fusion-directions: api/index.py:487-488 `if data.adversarialRules and data.adversarialRules.strip(): extra += f"...【用户红队对抗规则（最高优先级，违反即重写）】：{data.adversarialRules.strip()}"`; schema schemas.py:81.
- tweak-fusion-blocks: api/index.py:541-542 `adv = f"\n【用户红队对抗规则（必须遵守）】：..."`; schema schemas.py:107.
- generate-storyboard (run_generate_storyboard): api/index.py:581-582; schema StoryboardInput schemas.py:140.
- stream-storyboard: api/index.py:618-619 (shares StoryboardInput, schemas.py:140).
- stream-scene-text: api/index.py:690-691 `adv += f"\n【用户红队对抗规则（必须遵守）】：..."`; schema SceneTextInput schemas.py:153.

Frontend never sends it. Repo-wide grep for `adversarialRules` returns hits ONLY in CLAUDE.md:90, api/index.py, api/schemas.py — ZERO in components/. The four request bodies omit it:
- collide() FusionWorkshop.tsx:251-255 -> `{ dnaCards, userCustomPrompt: customPrompt.trim() || undefined, fusionBias: ... }`
- runTweak() :302-306 -> `{ ...blocks, targetBlock: tweakTarget, userInstruction: command.trim() }`
- generateStoryboard() :344-346 -> `streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', { selectedDirection: selectedDirection(), sceneCount: 3 }, ...)`
- generateScene() :389-397 -> `{ selectedDirection, currentScene, precedingTexts, currentDraft, resumeFromText }`

Design mismatch is real: CLAUDE.md FusionWorkshop section says 引力室 has "optional 自定义大方向 / 反套路红队约束" input, but the only step-1 textarea (FusionWorkshop.tsx:732-741, label "偏航指令（可选）", placeholder "自定义碰撞方向...") binds to `customPrompt` -> `userCustomPrompt`. No adversarialRules UI exists anywhere.
verdict.correctedDescription: Confirmed capability gap. The backend exposes an optional `adversarialRules` (红队对抗规则, max 2000 chars) on all 5 creation endpoints — generate-fusion-directions, tweak-fusion-blocks, generate-storyboard, stream-storyboard, stream-scene-text — injecting it as a high-priority prompt directive (index.py:487-488/541-542/581-582/618-619/690-691; schemas.py:81/107/140/153). The frontend provides NO UI for it and never includes the field in any of the four request bodies (collide/runTweak/generateStoryboard→stream-storyboard/generateScene), so the feature is entirely unreachable by users. CLAUDE.md (line 90 and the FusionWorkshop section claiming a "反套路红队约束" input in 引力室) overstates reality: the only step-1 textarea is the "偏航指令" field wired to userCustomPrompt. One refinement to the original claim: the frontend storyboard path uses the streaming endpoint stream-storyboard (not generate-storyboard); both accept adversarialRules and both go without it, so the gap holds regardless.

finding.title: generate-storyboard / stream-storyboard 的 sceneCount（1-8 可调分镜数） [mismatched]
finding.file: 前端写死 `sceneCount: 3`（FusionWorkshop.tsx:346）；后端 data.sceneCount 驱动 prompt（api/index.py:584,622,631）。无任何 UI 让用户选 1-8。
finding.detail: 提供分镜数选择器（1-8），传入 stream-storyboard；当前固定 3 浪费后端可调能力。

verdict.evidence:
FE hardcodes scene count, no UI exists: components/FusionWorkshop.tsx:346 — `await streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', { selectedDirection: selectedDirection(), sceneCount: 3 }, {...})`. A repo-wide grep for `sceneCount` returns this as the ONLY frontend occurrence; greps for `分镜数|场景数|scene[Cc]ount` UI find no `<input>`/slider/`<select>`, no useState, and no store field for scene count. The 故事板 UI block (FusionWorkshop.tsx:910-919) is just a label + single "生成故事板" button calling generateStoryboard(), with no number control.

Backend truly supports 1-8 and is prompt-driven: api/schemas.py:139 — `sceneCount: int = Field(3, ge=1, le=8)`. Used in run_generate_storyboard (api/index.py:584 `设计 {data.sceneCount} 个...分镜`, :592 `请输出 {data.sceneCount} 个分镜`) and in stream_storyboard (api/index.py:622 `生成 {data.sceneCount} 个...分镜`, :631 `[SCENE-{data.sceneCount}] ... [/SCENE-{data.sceneCount}]`, plus parse_storyboard_scene_blocks(stream_buffer, data.sceneCount) at :663).

One correction to the claim's framing: the frontend calls ONLY the SSE endpoint /api/py/stream-storyboard (FusionWorkshop.tsx:345). It does NOT call /api/py/generate-storyboard directly — that structured endpoint serves only as the backend's internal parse-failure fallback. The capability gap is identical for both, but the live path is the streaming one.
verdict.correctedDescription: capabilityGap CONFIRMED. The frontend hardcodes `sceneCount: 3` at FusionWorkshop.tsx:346 with zero UI to change it (no slider/input/select, no useState, no store field anywhere in the repo). The backend fully supports a user-selectable 1-8 range: StoryboardInput.sceneCount = Field(3, ge=1, le=8) (schemas.py:139), and that value drives the LLM prompt + scene-block parser in BOTH the structured generate-storyboard (index.py:584,592) and the SSE stream-storyboard (index.py:622,631,663). So the adjustable backend capability is genuinely wasted, fixed at 3. Caveat on the claim's location string: the UI only invokes the SSE endpoint stream-storyboard via streamSse(); generate-storyboard is not called by the frontend at all (it is the backend's auto-fallback when stream parsing fails). Suggested fix: add a 1-8 scene-count selector beside the 生成故事板 button and pass its value into the stream-storyboard payload (and to generate-storyboard if ever invoked directly).

finding.title: temperature（后端支持 0-1.5，按请求体生效） [partial]
finding.file: llmClient.ts:74-76 会把 temperature 注入请求体，store 默认 0.7 且 clampTemperature 到 0-1.5（store.ts:95-99）；但 SettingsPanel 与水晶卡均无任何 temperature 控件（SettingsPanel.tsx 全文/NovelUploader.tsx 水晶卡 1912-2008 仅 key/baseUrl/model）。
finding.detail: 确认 CLAUDE.md『前端无 UI 控制』属实——已核实：永远 0.7。如需创作多样性应加滑块。

verdict.evidence:
CODE SUPPORTS THE CLAIM IN FULL (substance), though cited paths drop the app//components/ prefix — real files are app/llmClient.ts, app/store.ts, components/SettingsPanel.tsx, components/NovelUploader.tsx; the line numbers match those real files exactly.

(1) Injection — app/llmClient.ts:74-76: `if (options?.includeTemperature !== false) { enrichedPayload.temperature = runtimeConfig.temperature; }`; runtimeConfig.temperature comes from llmConfig.temperature (llmClient.ts:28). Backend mirrors with `temperature: float = Field(0.7, ge=0.0, le=1.5)` on all 7 request schemas (api/schemas.py:22,49,86,111,144,157,190) and validate_llm_creds rejects out-of-range (api/index.py:185-186).

(2) Default + clamp — app/store.ts:11 `const DEFAULT_TEMPERATURE = 0.7;`; store.ts:71 `temperature: DEFAULT_TEMPERATURE`; store.ts:95-99 `clampTemperature` → `Math.max(0, Math.min(1.5, numeric))` (used only in migration at store.ts:142,164).

(3) No UI control + no setter — SettingsPanel.tsx (full file, 1-136) renders only provider <select>, API Key, Base URL, 模型. NovelUploader crystal card body lines 1912-2008 render only Provider tabs, API Key (or Ollama heartbeat), Base URL, 模型 — no temperature input. Grep across the repo (excluding node_modules) finds NO `setTemperature`/`updateTemperature` action; AppState interface (store.ts:74-93) and store body (store.ts:168-216) expose only setActiveProvider/updateActiveProviderProfile/setFusionBias/etc. So temperature can never be mutated from the UI: it is permanently the 0.7 default (only a pre-existing persisted LocalStorage value could differ, and nothing writes one).
verdict.correctedDescription: CONFIRMED. temperature is sent on every LLM request body and is clamped 0–1.5, but the frontend has zero UI control AND zero setter, so it is permanently the 0.7 default ("永远 0.7" is accurate). Verified: app/llmClient.ts:74-76 injects enrichedPayload.temperature = runtimeConfig.temperature (= llmConfig.temperature); app/store.ts default 0.7 (lines 11/71), clampTemperature 0–1.5 (lines 95-99, applied only during persisted-state migration at 142/164); backend enforces the same 0–1.5 on 7 Pydantic schemas (api/schemas.py) + validate_llm_creds (api/index.py:185-186). Neither SettingsPanel.tsx (whole file) nor NovelUploader.tsx's crystal config card (body lines 1912-2008) exposes a temperature control — both expose only Provider / API Key / Base URL / model. There is NO setTemperature/updateTemperature action anywhere (the AppState store at store.ts:74-93 + 168-216 only has setActiveProvider / updateActiveProviderProfile / setFusionBias / view-state setters), so the value cannot be changed at runtime. Matches CLAUDE.md's own note ("temperature is sent and clamped to 0–1.5 but currently has no UI control; it stays at the 0.7 default"). Only caveat vs the cited claim: the file paths in the claim omit the app//components/ directory prefixes (real paths: app/llmClient.ts, app/store.ts, components/SettingsPanel.tsx, components/NovelUploader.tsx), though the quoted line numbers match those real files exactly. If creative-diversity control is desired, add a slider + a setTemperature action.

finding.title: generate-storyboard（非流式） [unused]
finding.file: 前端无直接调用 generate-storyboard 的代码（仅作为后端 stream-storyboard 的内部回退）。
finding.detail: 保持现状；它由后端在解析失败时兜底，前端无需直连。

verdict.evidence:
Exhaustive enumeration of ALL '/api/py/...' string literals in the frontend (.ts/.tsx) yields 7 endpoints, generate-storyboard NOT among them: NovelUploader.tsx:1073 split-recommend; FusionWorkshop.tsx:251 generate-fusion-directions, :302 tweak-fusion-blocks, :345 stream-storyboard, :390 stream-scene-text; dnaEngine.ts:123 extract-chapter-map, :365 extract-book-reduce.

The UI "故事板" button (FusionWorkshop.tsx:913 onClick={generateStoryboard}) calls generateStoryboard() defined at FusionWorkshop.tsx:333, whose only network call is the SSE endpoint:
  L344-346:  await streamSse('/api/py/stream-storyboard', { selectedDirection: selectedDirection(), sceneCount: 3 }, {...})
It consumes onDelta/onDone and parses scenes from done payload OR the streamed text (parseStoryboardStreamText) — never touching the non-streaming route.

Backend internal-fallback confirmed in api/index.py stream_storyboard (route @app.post at L607):
  L663:  scenes = parse_storyboard_scene_blocks(stream_buffer, data.sceneCount)
  L664:  if not scenes:
  L665:      fallback = await run_generate_storyboard(data, request, enforce_rate_limit=False)
  L666:      scenes = [scene.model_dump() for scene in fallback.scenes]
The public route generate_storyboard (@app.post L602-604) wraps the same run_generate_storyboard but with enforce_rate_limit=True; the streaming fallback passes enforce_rate_limit=False (L665), proving it is an in-process server-side fallback, not a front-end HTTP hop. Note CLAUDE.md is stale here: L87 lists generate-storyboard as the storyboard endpoint and L125 says the funnel goes "→ generate-storyboard", but the shipped frontend actually uses stream-storyboard (SSE); stream-storyboard is undocumented in CLAUDE.md's endpoint table.
verdict.correctedDescription: 准确。前端无任何对 generate-storyboard 的直接调用——全代码库 7 个 '/api/py/' 端点字面量中不含它。故事板按钮调用的 generateStoryboard()（FusionWorkshop.tsx:333）走的是 SSE 端点 /api/py/stream-storyboard（L345，经 streamSse）。非流式 generate-storyboard 仅由后端 stream_storyboard 在 SSE 解析失败（parse_storyboard_scene_blocks 返回空）时作为进程内兜底调用 run_generate_storyboard(enforce_rate_limit=False)（index.py:664-666），绕过限流，区别于公开路由（L602，enforce_rate_limit=True）。建议"保持现状"成立。补充：CLAUDE.md 此处过时——其端点表/funnel 描述仍写 generate-storyboard 为故事板端点（L87、L125），却未记载实际使用的 stream-storyboard（SSE）；文档应更新，但论断本身（前端不直连 generate-storyboard，它是后端回退）完全成立。

finding.title: store.rateLimited 限速护航灯（全局可消费） [partial]
finding.file: 仅 NovelDetail.tsx:593（提取阶段黄条）与螺旋变黄(515)消费；FusionWorkshop/NovelUploader 的 LLM 调用既不点亮也不消费 rateLimited。
finding.detail: 工坊与智能拆分阶段也接入 rateLimited 护航，保证全局 429 体验一致。

verdict.evidence:
WRITER (唯一点亮处) — app/dnaEngine.ts: 32-46 `let rateLimitWaiting=0; enterRateLimitWait(){...setRateLimited(true)} leaveRateLimitWait(){...setRateLimited(false)}`，仅被 L85 `withRateLimitRetry` 调用；429 仅在两处提取调用被识别：L127-128 `if (response.status===429) throw new RateLimitSignal()` (extract-chapter-map) 与 L369-370 (extract-book-reduce)。store.ts:83/180/181/240 定义 `rateLimited:boolean`+`setRateLimited`+`resetSequencingState`（全局可读）。
